allow: PowerShell(foreach \($d in @\("data","strategies","backtests","utils"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $d | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell(& ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import vectorbt as vbt, ccxt, yfinance, pandas as pd, numpy as np, numba, plotly; print\('vectorbt', vbt.__version__\); print\('ccxt', ccxt.__version__\); print\('pandas', pd.__version__\); print\('numpy', np.__version__\); print\('numba', numba.__version__\); print\('OK - all imports succeed'\)")

PowerShell(& ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -m pip freeze | Out-File -FilePath requirements.txt -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "requirements.txt written \($\(\(Get-Content requirements.txt\).Count\) lines\)")
PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import vectorbt as vbt; import pandas as pd; print\([c for c in dir\(vbt.Portfolio\) if not c.startswith\('_'\)]\)")
PowerShell(Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object { $_.TaskName -match 'alpaca|paper|trend|momentum|trade|strat|daily' } | Select-Object TaskName, State, TaskPath | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($cands = 250,251,252,240; foreach \($c in $cands\) { $ip = "192.168.50.$c"; $r = Test-Connection -ComputerName $ip -Count 1 -Quiet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { Write-Output "$ip : IN USE \(pick another\)" } else { Write-Output "$ip : free" } })
